assertion_results.text: The response describes locating the digest comment using the marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' from shared/description-digest-protocol.md
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md, line 19: "Search all returned comments for bodies starting with the marker string `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:`." The exact marker string is used to locate the digest comment. The sample digest comment on line 8 also shows this marker: "[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:a1b2c3d4e5f67890...". While the file shared/description-digest-protocol.md is not explicitly cited as the source of the marker string, the marker string itself is correctly used as specified.

assertion_results.text: The response describes computing a digest of the current description (using scripts/sha256-digest.py or SHA-256) and comparing it with the stored digest
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md, lines 36-43: The response describes extracting the description field from TC-9201, writing it to a temp file, and computing the digest via "python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt". Lines 46-51 describe comparing format tags (both sha256-md). Lines 53-58 describe comparing hex digests: stored hex vs computed hex, both matching.

assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md, line 58: "**Result: MATCH**". Line 60: "The digests match. The task description has not been modified since plan-feature created it." Line 64: "Per the protocol, when digests match: **proceed silently**. No user prompt is displayed, no warning is emitted, no additional latency is introduced. The skill continues directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies)." Also in plan.md, line 54: "Proceed silently."

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md, line 64: "The skill continues directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies)." In plan.md, line 54: "Digest comment found with matching format tag (`sha256-md`) and matching hex digest. Comment was not edited (created == updated). **Proceed silently.**" The plan then continues directly to "Step 2 -- Verify Dependencies" (plan.md line 57) with no user alert, pause, or prompt described anywhere in the outputs.
